member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.ApplicationAccessibleHandler
member.summary: implementation for .

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.ApplicationAccessibleHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer,Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.ApplicationAtSpiNode)
member.summary: implementation for .

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.ApplicationAtSpiNode
member.summary: Synthetic application root node that is not backed by an . Registered at /org/a11y/atspi/accessible/root and serves as the AT-SPI tree root.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.ApplicationAtSpiNode.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Synthetic application root node that is not backed by an . Registered at /org/a11y/atspi/accessible/root and serves as the AT-SPI tree root.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.ApplicationNodeApplicationHandler
member.summary: implementation for .

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiAccessibilityWatcher
member.summary: Monitors the session bus to detect whether a screen reader is active.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiCacheHandler
member.summary: Registers a dummy AT-SPI cache interface at /org/a11y/atspi/cache.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiConstants
member.summary: Well-known AT-SPI2 D-Bus paths, interface names, and utility methods.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiNode
member.summary: Represents an element in the AT-SPI tree, backed by an AutomationPeer.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiRegistryEventTracker
member.summary: Monitors the AT-SPI registry to determine if any screen reader is listening for events.

member.name: P:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiRegistryEventTracker.HasEventListeners
member.summary: Indicates whether any screen reader is currently listening for object events. Defaults to true (chatty) until registry tracking confirms otherwise.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiRole
member.summary: AT-SPI2 role IDs

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer
member.summary: Manages the AT-SPI D-Bus connection, node registration, and event emission.

member.name: P:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer.HasEventListeners
member.summary: Indicates whether any screen reader is currently listening for object events. Defaults to true (chatty) until registry tracking confirms otherwise.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer.StartAsync
member.summary:
Starts the AT-SPI server. Must be called on the UI thread.
Call order in this method is important because AT's are sensitive and/or broken.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer.AddWindow(Avalonia.Automation.Peers.AutomationPeer)
member.summary: Adds a window to the AT-SPI tree.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer.RemoveWindow(Avalonia.Automation.Peers.AutomationPeer)
member.summary: Removes a window from the AT-SPI tree.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiState
member.summary: AT-SPI2 state IDs from atspi-constants.h.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiAccessibleHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Accessible interface for an AutomationPeer-backed node.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiAccessibleHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer,Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiNode)
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Accessible interface for an AutomationPeer-backed node.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiActionHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Action interface (invoke, toggle, expand/collapse, scroll).

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiActionHandler.ActionEntry
member.summary: Describes a single AT-SPI action exposed by a node.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiActionHandler.ActionEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Describes a single AT-SPI action exposed by a node.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiCollectionHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Collection interface for match-based node queries.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiCollectionHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer,Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiNode)
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Collection interface for match-based node queries.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiComponentHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Component interface (geometry and focus).

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiComponentHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer,Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiNode)
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Component interface (geometry and focus).

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiCoordinateHelper
member.summary: Coordinate translation utilities between screen, window, and parent frames.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiEditableTextHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI EditableText interface for writable text content.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiEditableTextHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiNode)
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI EditableText interface for writable text content.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiEventObjectHandler
member.summary: Emits AT-SPI Event.Object signals (children-changed, state-changed, property-change).

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiEventObjectHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer,System.String)
member.summary: Emits AT-SPI Event.Object signals (children-changed, state-changed, property-change).

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiEventWindowHandler
member.summary: Emits AT-SPI Event.Window signals (activate, deactivate).

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiEventWindowHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer,System.String)
member.summary: Emits AT-SPI Event.Window signals (activate, deactivate).

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiImageHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Image interface for image controls.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiSelectionHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Selection interface for list-like containers.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiSelectionHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiServer,Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiNode)
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Selection interface for list-like containers.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiTextHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Text interface for read-only text content.

member.name: M:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiTextHandler.#ctor(Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.AtSpiNode)
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Text interface for read-only text content.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.Handlers.AtSpiValueHandler
member.summary: Implements the AT-SPI Value interface for range-based controls.

member.name: T:Avalonia.FreeDesktop.AtSpi.RootAtSpiNode
member.summary: AT-SPI node for a top-level window with coordinate translation support.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.BuiltInIntrospectionHandler
member.summary: Built-in handler for org.freedesktop.DBus.Introspectable. Auto-generates introspection XML from the registered handler keys for the target path, including child sub-paths.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.BuiltInIntrospectionHandler.#ctor(System.Func{System.String,Avalonia.DBus.IntrospectionData})
member.summary: Built-in handler for org.freedesktop.DBus.Introspectable. Auto-generates introspection XML from the registered handler keys for the target path, including child sub-paths.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.BuiltInIntrospectionHandler.BoundPath
member.summary: The path this handler is bound to. Set after construction by the registration helper so we can look up our own path.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.IntrospectionData
member.summary: Introspection data resolved for a given object path.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.IntrospectionData.Interfaces
member.summary: D-Bus interfaces registered at this exact path. Each entry is (interfaceName, introspection-writer-or-null).

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.IntrospectionData.ChildSegments
member.summary: Immediate child path segments (e.g. for path "/org" this might contain "a11y" if "/org/a11y/..." is registered).

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection
member.summary: An implementation that exchanges values through channels, assigns request serials, and correlates replies on a background receive loop.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection.#ctor(System.Threading.Channels.ChannelReader{Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage},System.Threading.Channels.ChannelWriter{Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage},System.Net.Sockets.Socket,System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a channel-backed wire connection.
member.param: Produces serialized inbound messages.
Consumes serialized outbound messages.
An optional socket to dispose with the connection.
An optional cancellation source controlling the underlying transport tasks.
The bus-assigned unique name for this connection, or for peer-to-peer transports.
when the connection is not attached to a message bus.

member.summary: Creates a channel-backed wire connection with diagnostics hooks.
member.param: Produces serialized inbound messages.
Consumes serialized outbound messages.
An optional socket to dispose with the connection.
An optional cancellation source controlling the underlying transport tasks.
The bus-assigned unique name for this connection, or for peer-to-peer transports.
when the connection is not attached to a message bus.
Receives transport warnings such as malformed inbound messages.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection.IsPeerToPeer
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this connection is peer-to-peer and therefore has no message bus.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection.ReceivingReader
member.summary: Gets the reader for inbound messages that were not matched to a pending reply.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection.GetUniqueNameAsync
member.summary: Returns the bus-assigned unique name supplied at construction time, or for peer-to-peer transports.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection.SendAsync(Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Serializes and sends a message without waiting for a reply.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection.SendWithReplyAsync(Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Serializes and sends a message, then waits for a reply whose reply serial matches the request serial.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.ChannelsDBusWireConnection.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Stops the receive loop, shuts down the underlying transport, and fails outstanding reply waiters.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.#ctor(Avalonia.DBus.IDBusWireConnection,Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics)
member.summary: Creates a connection using the specified wire transport.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.ConnectAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to a D-Bus address or one of the built-in session/system aliases.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.ConnectAsync(System.String,Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to a D-Bus address or one of the built-in session/system aliases.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.ConnectSessionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the session bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.ConnectSessionAsync(Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the session bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.ConnectSystemAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the system bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.ConnectSystemAsync(Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the system bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.RegisterObjects(Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object},System.Threading.SynchronizationContext)
member.summary: Registers all generated D-Bus interfaces implemented by the provided at the specified object path.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.CallMethodAsync(System.String,Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Object[])
member.summary: Calls a method on a remote object and returns the reply.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.SubscribeAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath},System.String,System.String,System.Func{Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.SynchronizationContext)
member.summary: Subscribes to signals matching the specified criteria.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusConnection.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Closes the connection and releases resources.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a D-Bus method call returns an ERROR message.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusException.ErrorName
member.summary: The D-Bus error name (e.g., "org.freedesktop.DBus.Error.ServiceUnknown").

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusException.ErrorReply
member.summary: The original ERROR message, if available.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage
member.summary: A pure managed class representing a D-Bus message.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Type
member.summary: The message type.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Flags
member.summary: Message flags.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Serial
member.summary: Message serial number. Assigned by the connection when sent.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.ReplySerial
member.summary: For METHOD_RETURN and ERROR: the serial of the METHOD_CALL being replied to.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Path
member.summary: Object path (for METHOD_CALL and SIGNAL).

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Interface
member.summary: Interface name.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Member
member.summary: Method or signal name.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.ErrorName
member.summary: Error name (for ERROR messages).

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Destination
member.summary: Destination bus name.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Sender
member.summary: Sender's unique bus name. Set by the message bus.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Signature
member.summary: Type signature of the message body. Computed from Body contents.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.Body
member.summary: Message body as a list of typed values.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.CreateMethodCall(System.String,Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath,System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates a METHOD_CALL message.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.CreateSignal(Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath,System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates a SIGNAL message.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.CreateReply(System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates a METHOD_RETURN message in reply to this message.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.CreateReplyWithSignature(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates a METHOD_RETURN message with an explicit D-Bus body signature. Use when the signature is known at compile time to avoid inference failures on empty arrays.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.CreateSignalWithSignature(Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates a SIGNAL message with an explicit D-Bus body signature. Use when the signature is known at compile time to avoid inference failures on empty arrays.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.CreateError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an ERROR message in reply to this message.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.IsMethodCall(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if this is a METHOD_CALL for the specified interface and member.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.IsSignal(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if this is a SIGNAL for the specified interface and member.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage.IsError(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if this is an ERROR with the specified error name.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus object path.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusObjectPath.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus object path.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.DBusRequestNameFlags.AllowReplacement
member.summary: Allow other connections to take over this name.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.DBusRequestNameFlags.ReplaceExisting
member.summary: Try to take over the name from the current owner.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.DBusRequestNameFlags.DoNotQueue
member.summary: Don't queue for the name if it's already owned.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.DBusRequestNameReply.PrimaryOwner
member.summary: The caller is now the primary owner of the name.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.DBusRequestNameReply.InQueue
member.summary: The caller is in the queue to own the name.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.DBusRequestNameReply.Exists
member.summary: The name already has an owner and DoNotQueue was specified.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.DBusRequestNameReply.AlreadyOwner
member.summary: The caller already owns the name.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus message in wire format together with any ancillary Unix file descriptors that were transported outside the byte payload.
member.param: The serialized D-Bus message bytes, including the header and body.
Ancillary Unix file descriptors referenced by the serialized payload.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32[])
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus message in wire format together with any ancillary Unix file descriptors that were transported outside the byte payload.
member.param: The serialized D-Bus message bytes, including the header and body.
Ancillary Unix file descriptors referenced by the serialized payload.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage.Message
member.summary: The serialized D-Bus message bytes, including the header and body.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage.Fds
member.summary: Ancillary Unix file descriptors referenced by the serialized payload.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusSignature
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus type signature.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusSignature.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus type signature.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusStruct
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus struct (sequence of typed fields).

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusStruct.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object})
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus struct (sequence of typed fields).

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusUnixFd
member.summary: Represents a Unix file descriptor passed over D-Bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusUnixFd.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a Unix file descriptor passed over D-Bus.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.DBusVariant
member.summary: Represents a D-Bus variant (dynamically typed value).

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusVariant.Signature
member.summary: The D-Bus type signature of the contained value.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.DBusVariant.Value
member.summary: The contained value.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusVariant.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a variant with an inferred signature based on the value's .NET type.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusVariant.#ctor(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a variant with an explicit D-Bus signature, bypassing inference. Use when the signature is known at compile time to avoid inference failures on empty arrays.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusMessageSerializer
member.summary: Converts between logical instances and serialized D-Bus wire payloads.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusMessageSerializer.Serialize(Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage)
member.summary: Serializes a message into D-Bus wire bytes plus any ancillary Unix file descriptors.
member.param: The message to serialize.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusMessageSerializer.Deserialize(Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage)
member.summary: Deserializes a wire payload and its ancillary Unix file descriptors into a logical D-Bus message.
member.param: The serialized message payload to deserialize.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusStructConvertible
member.summary: Represents a value that can be converted to a D-Bus struct payload.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusWireConnection
member.summary: Abstraction for low-level D-Bus message transport. Implement this interface to provide a custom transport (e.g., named pipes, TCP).

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusWireConnection.SendAsync(Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message without waiting for a reply.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusWireConnection.SendWithReplyAsync(Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message and waits for a reply.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusWireConnection.ReceivingReader
member.summary: Reader for incoming messages (METHOD_CALL, SIGNAL, etc.).

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusWireConnection.GetUniqueNameAsync
member.summary: The unique name assigned by the message bus (e.g., ":1.42"). Null if not connected to a message bus or in peer-to-peer mode.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.IDBusWireConnection.IsPeerToPeer
member.summary: Returns true if this connection is peer-to-peer (no message bus). When true, AddMatch/RemoveMatch bus methods are skipped.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessageMarshaler.AppendValueWithSignature(Avalonia.DBus.Native.DBusMessageIter@,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Appends a value using a known D-Bus signature to guide array/dict serialization. Falls back to inference-based AppendValue for non-container types.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessageMarshaler.AppendArrayWithSignature(Avalonia.DBus.Native.DBusMessageIter@,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Appends an array using a known element signature, avoiding inference on the value. This handles empty arrays of struct types correctly.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessageMarshaler.AppendDictWithSignature(Avalonia.DBus.Native.DBusMessageIter@,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Appends a dictionary using a known entry signature, avoiding inference on the value.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection
member.summary: A libdbus-backed implementation.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.ConnectAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to a D-Bus address or one of the built-in session/system aliases.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.ConnectSessionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the session bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.ConnectSystemAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the system bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.GetUniqueNameAsync
member.summary: The unique name assigned by the message bus (e.g., ":1.42"). Null if the connection is not attached to a message bus.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.SendAsync(Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message without waiting for a reply.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.SendWithReplyAsync(Avalonia.DBus.DBusMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message and waits for a reply.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.ReceivingReader
member.summary: Reader for incoming messages (METHOD_CALL, SIGNAL, etc.). Used by higher-level connection workers.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireConnection.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Closes the connection and releases resources.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.LibDBusWireWorker.LogOrTrace(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message that should never be silently lost. Uses diagnostics if available, otherwise falls back to stderr so errors are always observable.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader
member.summary: Reads CLR primitives from D-Bus wire format bytes. This is the deserialize half of the managed marshaller — the inverse of . Supports both little-endian and big-endian byte order.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new reader over the given byte array.
member.param: The raw bytes to read from.
If true, reads multi-byte values as big-endian; otherwise little-endian.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current read position.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.Length
member.summary: Total buffer length.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadByte
member.summary: Reads a single byte. No alignment required.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadBoolean
member.summary: Reads a boolean from a uint32 (4-byte aligned). Returns true if non-zero.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadInt16
member.summary: Reads a 2-byte aligned signed 16-bit integer using the configured byte order.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadUInt16
member.summary: Reads a 2-byte aligned unsigned 16-bit integer using the configured byte order.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadInt32
member.summary: Reads a 4-byte aligned signed 32-bit integer using the configured byte order.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadUInt32
member.summary: Reads a 4-byte aligned unsigned 32-bit integer using the configured byte order.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadInt64
member.summary: Reads an 8-byte aligned signed 64-bit integer using the configured byte order.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadUInt64
member.summary: Reads an 8-byte aligned unsigned 64-bit integer using the configured byte order.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadDouble
member.summary: Reads an 8-byte aligned IEEE 754 double using the configured byte order. Reads as int64 and converts via .

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadString
member.summary: Reads a D-Bus STRING: uint32 length prefix (4-byte aligned), UTF-8 bytes, null terminator.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadObjectPath
member.summary: Reads a D-Bus OBJECT_PATH: same wire format as STRING.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadSignature
member.summary: Reads a D-Bus SIGNATURE: byte length prefix (NOT uint32), ASCII bytes, null terminator. No alignment padding.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadPad(System.Int32)
member.summary: Advances the read position to the next multiple of the specified alignment.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireReader.ReadNull
member.summary: Reads and verifies a single zero byte (null terminator).

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter
member.summary: Writes CLR primitives into D-Bus wire format bytes (little-endian). This is the serialize half of the managed marshaller.

member.name: P:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.Position
member.summary: Gets the current write position in the stream.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.SetPosition(System.Int64)
member.summary: Seeks to the specified position. Used for backpatching array lengths.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.ToArray
member.summary: Returns all written bytes as a byte array.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteByte(System.Byte)
member.summary: Writes a single byte. No alignment required.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteBoolean(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes a boolean as a uint32 (0 or 1), 4-byte aligned.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteInt16(System.Int16)
member.summary: Writes a signed 16-bit integer, 2-byte aligned, little-endian.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteUInt16(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes an unsigned 16-bit integer, 2-byte aligned, little-endian.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteInt32(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a signed 32-bit integer, 4-byte aligned, little-endian.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteUInt32(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes an unsigned 32-bit integer, 4-byte aligned, little-endian.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteInt64(System.Int64)
member.summary: Writes a signed 64-bit integer, 8-byte aligned, little-endian.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteUInt64(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes an unsigned 64-bit integer, 8-byte aligned, little-endian.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteDouble(System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a double as 8 bytes, 8-byte aligned, little-endian. Uses BitConverter.DoubleToInt64Bits then writes as int64.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteString(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a D-Bus STRING: 4-byte aligned uint32 length prefix, UTF-8 bytes, null terminator.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteObjectPath(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a D-Bus OBJECT_PATH: same wire format as STRING.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteSignature(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a D-Bus SIGNATURE: byte length prefix (NOT uint32), ASCII bytes, null terminator. No alignment padding.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WritePad(System.Int32)
member.summary: Advances the write position to the next multiple of the specified alignment, writing zero bytes for padding.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.DBusWireWriter.WriteNull
member.summary: Writes a single zero byte.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.Managed.ManagedDBusMessageSerializer
member.summary: Converts between and using the managed and . Serialization emits little-endian D-Bus messages; deserialization accepts either D-Bus byte order.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.DBusTransport
member.summary: Provides factory methods for bridging connected stream sockets to raw D-Bus wire framing.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.DBusTransport.FromSocket(System.Net.Sockets.Socket)
member.summary: Bridges a connected to a pair of channels carrying using D-Bus wire framing.
member.param: Any already-connected stream socket supplied by the caller.
member.returns:
A 5-tuple of (Reader, Writer, Cts, ReaderTask, WriterTask) where:
Reader — read D-Bus messages arriving on the socket
Writer — write D-Bus messages to send over the socket
Cts — the controlling the background tasks
ReaderTask — the background task reading from the socket
WriterTask — the background task writing to the socket
This helper transports only the inline D-Bus message bytes. Inbound ancillary Unix file descriptors are not reconstructed on the returned reader, and outbound file descriptors are logged and dropped by the writer path.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.DBusTransport.FromSocket(System.Net.Sockets.Socket,Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics)
member.summary: Bridges a connected to a pair of channels carrying using D-Bus wire framing.
member.param: Any already-connected stream socket supplied by the caller.
Receives warnings and unobserved background task failures from the transport.
member.returns:
A 5-tuple of (Reader, Writer, Cts, ReaderTask, WriterTask) where:
Reader reads D-Bus messages arriving on the socket.
Writer writes D-Bus messages to send over the socket.
Cts controls the background reader and writer tasks.
ReaderTask is the background task reading from the socket.
WriterTask is the background task writing to the socket.
This helper transports only the inline D-Bus message bytes.
For now, inbound ancillary Unix file descriptors are not reconstructed on the returned reader, and outbound file descriptors are logged and dropped by the writer path.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.DBusTransport.ConnectUnix(System.String)
member.summary: Convenience helper that opens a Unix domain stream socket and returns a peer-to-peer using raw D-Bus wire framing over it. This helper does not perform D-Bus authentication or the bus Hello exchange.
member.param: The file-system path of the Unix domain socket.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.DBusTransport.ConnectUnix(System.String,Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics)
member.summary: Convenience helper that opens a Unix domain stream socket and returns a peer-to-peer using raw D-Bus wire framing over it. This helper does not perform D-Bus authentication or the bus Hello exchange.
member.param: The file-system path of the Unix domain socket.
Receives warnings and unobserved background task failures from the transport.

member.name: T:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.UnixSocketDBusTransport
member.summary: Internal helper that pumps serialized D-Bus messages between a connected and channel-based transport endpoints. This managed socket transport does not transfer ancillary Unix file descriptors.

member.name: F:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.UnixSocketDBusTransport.MaxMessageLength
member.summary: Maximum accepted message size in bytes. Totals above 128 MiB are rejected.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.UnixSocketDBusTransport.StartReaderAsync(System.Net.Sockets.Socket,System.Threading.Channels.ChannelWriter{Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage},System.Threading.CancellationToken,Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics)
member.summary: Starts a background reader task that reads D-Bus messages from the socket and writes them to the inbound channel.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.UnixSocketDBusTransport.StartWriterAsync(System.Net.Sockets.Socket,System.Threading.Channels.ChannelReader{Avalonia.DBus.DBusSerializedMessage},System.Threading.CancellationToken,Avalonia.DBus.IDBusDiagnostics)
member.summary: Starts a background writer task that reads messages from the outbound channel and sends them to the socket.

member.name: M:Avalonia.DBus.Transport.UnixSocketDBusTransport.ReadExactAsync(System.Net.Sockets.Socket,System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads exactly .Length bytes from the socket, handling partial reads.
